title: The One Who Decides Where to Fly
overview: After the first live performance, 283 Productions idols are busy with work when the producer announces a Halloween event with fans and the addition of a new unit, Straylight.

title: Straylight.run() // playback
overview: Fuyuko, who believes "idols are made through calculation," teams up with Asahi and Mei in Straylight. Asahi is indifferent to others' opinions, while Fuyuko thinks idols should be loved. This is the story of Straylight's path to debut.

title: A New Light Through Unity
overview: As the big day approaches, the teams finish their preparations, encouraging one another. As they rehearse and bond, Mano hopes to give her best alongside her friends, ready to face the upcoming performance together.

title: Happy Surprise Trick!
overview: The idols host a fun-filled Halloween party, delivering special performances and enjoying a closer connection with their fans. The event strengthens their bond and creates lasting memories for everyone involved.

title: When We Said 'Let's Go,' It Was Already Decided
overview: Noctchill prepare for their live debut, but plans change and tensions rise. Despite challenges, they stay united, embracing their bond as childhood friends while facing an uncertain future.

title: Beyond the True Feelings
overview: The idols reflect on their goals and challenges. Noctchill discusses their direction, guided by the producer to follow their hearts. Mano discovers joy in performing, and the girls explore their journeys, hinting at new beginnings through music.

title: The Most Important Thing
overview: Sakuya faces emotional challenges as she reflects on her relationships and the future of her group. Through heartfelt conversations and moments of introspection, she learns the importance of trust and connection with those around her.

title: Alstroemeria Is...
overview: Alstroemeria prepares for an Apricot magazine audition, confronting personal doubts and motivations. Through heartfelt moments and reflection, they deepen their bond as Alstroemeria, embracing both unity and individuality.

title: One Resolution for the Two of Me
overview: Mei reflects on balancing her true self with her "mysterious" idol persona. Guided by Fuyuko and Asahi's support, she considers showing her authentic side on stage, exploring how to bring both parts of her identity together.

title: That's My Dream
overview: Houkago Climax Girls prepare for a major tour, reflecting on their dreams and growth. Through heartfelt moments and teamwork, they strengthen their bonds, ready to shine brighter than ever.

title: What I Can Do
overview: The idols face personal challenges and reflect on their goals while preparing for a big performance. Through shared moments and quiet determination, they strengthen their bonds and take steps toward discovering their true selves.

title: The Brilliance of This Moment Alone
overview: The idols embark on their first tour, facing challenges and growth as they shine together on stage. Through shared determination and support, they discover new strengths, inspiring themselves and those around them to keep moving forward.
